scripts.start: set CI=true&& set NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false&& node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js serve --no-open --proxy-config proxy.conf.json
scripts.build: set CI=true&& set NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false&& node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js build --progress=false
scripts.test: set CI=true&& set NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false&& node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js test
scripts.test:ci: set CI=true&& set NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false&& node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
